conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The package I ordered got delayed by a couple of days.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Choosing a design tool for the team -- Figma, Sketch, and Adobe XD are the options.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally fixed the squeaky hinge on my front door.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I switched my podcast subscription to a cheaper plan.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my gym membership before it lapses.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Sketch is Mac-only which is a problem since a couple of us are on Windows.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally organized the pile of mail that's been sitting on my counter.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Adobe XD bundles with the rest of the Adobe suite we already pay for, which is appealing cost-wise.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been meaning to reorganize the garage for weeks now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to change the filter in the air conditioner, it's overdue.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been trying a new recipe for meal prep this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Figma's real-time collaboration is the big draw, especially since half the team is remote.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The elevator in my building has been out of service since Monday.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Changed the air filter, definitely should have done that sooner.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally returned that overdue library book.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Tried co-editing a file in Figma with a remote teammate, it worked way smoother than I expected.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Adobe XD would save us a bit of money but Sketch is off the table entirely because of the Mac requirement.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My sister called to catch up, hadn't talked in a few weeks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My dentist appointment got rescheduled to next month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Showed the Figma prototype to the wider team and the real-time commenting got a really positive reaction.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're going with Figma for the team. The real-time collaboration for our remote teammates was worth more to us than the cost savings from bundling with Adobe.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'll set up the team workspace this week.

query: Which design tool did the team decide to use?

answer_contains: real-time collaboration for our remote teammates
